title: Positive-density ground states of the Gross-Pitaevskii equation
comment: Final version to appear in "Probability and Mathematical Physics"
summary:
We consider the nonlinear Gross-Pitaevskii equation at positive density, that
is, for a bounded solution not tending to 0 at infinity. We focus on infinite
ground states, which are by definition minimizers of the energy under local
perturbations. When the Fourier transform of the interaction potential takes
negative values we prove the existence of a phase transition at high density,
where the constant solution ceases to be a ground state. The analysis requires
mixing techniques from elliptic PDE theory and statistical mechanics, in order
to deal with a large class of interaction potentials.

AI.tldr: 证明了Gross-Pitaevskii方程在高密度下存在相变，其中常数解不再是基态
AI.motivation: 研究非线性Gross-Pitaevskii方程在正密度下的行为，关注无穷远处的有界解（不趋于零），特别研究无限基态（局部扰动下的能量极小值）
AI.techniques: 混合椭圆PDE理论和统计力学技术，处理一大类相互作用势
AI.main_theorems: 当相互作用势的傅里叶变换取负值时，证明在高密度下存在相变，此时常数解不再是基态
AI.significance: 为Gross-Pitaevskii方程在正密度下的相变行为提供了严格数学证明，连接了PDE理论和统计力学，对理解玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚中的相变现象有重要意义

title: Non-rigidity of the absolutely continuous part of $\mathcal{A}$-free   measures
comment:
Several examples were added, including the case of exterior
  derivatives; in that case, it is proved that the exterior derivative operator
  is balanceable. Other minor corrections from the previous version were
  included
summary:
We generalize a result by Alberti, showing that, if a first-order linear
differential operator $\mathcal{A}$ belongs to a certain class, then any $L^1$
function is the absolutely continuous part of a measure $\mu$ satisfying
$\mathcal{A}\mu=0$. When $\mathcal{A}$ is scalar valued, we provide a necessary
and sufficient condition for the above property to hold true and we prove
dimensional estimates on the singular part of $\mu$. Finally, we show that
operators in the above class satisfy a Lusin-type property.

AI.tldr: 推广Alberti的结果，证明某类一阶线性微分算子满足：任何L¹函数都是满足算子方程为零的测度的绝对连续部分
AI.motivation: 研究一阶线性微分算子的性质，特别是关于测度分解和算子方程解的存在性问题，推广Alberti的经典结果
AI.techniques: 测度论、泛函分析、偏微分方程理论、算子分解技术、Lusin型性质分析
AI.main_theorems: 1) 对某类算子，任何L¹函数都是满足算子方程为零的测度的绝对连续部分；2) 标量算子情况的充要条件；3) 奇异部分维数估计；4) Lusin型性质
AI.significance: 深化了对微分算子与测度分解关系的理解，为研究算子方程解的结构提供了新工具，在偏微分方程理论和几何测度论中有重要应用

title: Smooth invariant foliations and Koopman eigenfunctions about stable   equilibria of semiflows
summary:
We consider a $C^r$ semiflow $\{ \varphi_t \}_{t \geq 0}$ on a Banach space
$X$ admitting a stable fixed point $x$. We show, along the lines of the
parameterization method (Cabr\'e et al., 2003), the existence of a $C^r$
invariant foliation tangent to $X_1$ at $x$, for an arbitrary $D
\varphi_t(x)$-invariant subspace $X_1 \subset X$ satisfying some additional
spectral conditions. Uniqueness ensues in a subclass of sufficiently smooth
invariant foliations tangent to $X_1$ at $x$. We then draw relations to Koopman
theory, and thereby establish the existence and uniqueness, in some appropriate
sense, of $C^r$ Koopman eigenfunctions. We demonstrate that these results apply
to the case of the Navier-Stokes system, the archetypal example considered by
the modern upheaval of applied 'Koopmanism'.

AI.tldr: 证明了在Banach空间上半流存在C^r不变叶层，并建立了与Koopman理论的联系，特别应用于Navier-Stokes系统。
AI.motivation: 研究Banach空间上半流的不变叶层存在性，建立与Koopman理论的联系，解决现代应用Koopman理论中Navier-Stokes系统的数学基础问题。
AI.techniques: 参数化方法(Cabré et al., 2003)、谱分析、不变子空间理论、Koopman算子理论、非线性动力系统分析。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在满足谱条件的任意Dφ_t(x)-不变子空间X_1上存在C^r不变叶层；2. 在足够光滑的不变叶层子类中证明唯一性；3. 建立与Koopman理论的联系，证明C^r Koopman特征函数的存在唯一性。
AI.significance: 为现代应用Koopman理论提供严格的数学基础，特别为Navier-Stokes系统的Koopman分析建立理论基础，连接了动力系统的不变叶层理论与Koopman算子理论。

title: Phase space contraction of degenerately damped random splittings
summary:
When studying out-of-equilibrium systems, one often excites the dynamics in
some degrees of freedom while removing the excitation in others through
damping. In order for the system to converge to a statistical steady state, the
dynamics must transfer the energy from the excited modes to the dissipative
directions. The precise mechanisms underlying this transfer are of particular
interest and are the topic of this paper. We explore a class of randomly
switched models introduced in [2,3] and provide some of the first results
showing that minimal damping is sufficient to stabilize the system in a fluids
model.

AI.tldr: 证明了在随机切换的流体模型中，最小阻尼足以使系统稳定到统计稳态
AI.motivation: 研究非平衡系统中能量从激发模式向耗散方向转移的机制，特别是随机切换模型中的稳定化问题
AI.techniques: 随机切换模型、流体动力学、统计力学、能量转移分析、稳定性理论
AI.main_theorems: 在流体模型中证明了最小阻尼足以使随机切换系统稳定到统计稳态
AI.significance: 为理解非平衡系统中的能量转移机制提供了理论基础，对流体动力学和统计物理有重要意义

title: Second order regularity for solutions to anisotropic degenerate elliptic   equations
summary:
We consider solutions to degenerate anisotropic elliptic equations in order
to study their regularity. In particular we establish second-order estimates
and enclose regularity results for the stress field. All our results are new
even in the euclidean case.

AI.tldr: 本文建立了退化各向异性椭圆方程解的二阶估计和应力场正则性结果
AI.motivation: 研究退化各向异性椭圆方程的正则性理论，这类方程在材料科学、弹性力学等领域有重要应用，其退化性和各向异性使得正则性分析具有挑战性
AI.techniques: 采用退化椭圆方程的正则性理论方法，可能包括变分法、极大值原理、能量估计、De Giorgi-Nash-Moser型迭代等技巧来处理退化性和各向异性
AI.main_theorems: 建立了退化各向异性椭圆方程解的二阶导数估计，证明了应力场的正则性结果，即使在欧几里得情形下这些结果也是全新的
AI.significance: 为退化各向异性椭圆方程的正则性理论提供了重要进展，对理解材料力学中的应力分布、各向异性介质中的偏微分方程解的行为有重要意义

title: Gray and black solitons of nonlocal Gross-Pitaevskii equations:   existence, monotonicity and nonlocal-to-local limit
summary:
This article investigates the qualitative aspects of dark solitons of
one-dimensional Gross-Pitaevskii equations with general nonlocal interactions,
which correspond to traveling waves with subsonic speeds. Under general
conditions on the potential interaction term, we provide uniform bounds,
demonstrate the existence of symmetric solitons, and identify conditions under
which monotonicity is lost. Additionally, we present new properties of black
solitons. Moreover, we establish the nonlocal-to-local convergence, i.e. the
convergence of the soliton of the nonlocal model toward the explicit dark
solitons of the local Gross-Pitaevskii equation.

AI.tldr: 研究非局部Gross-Pitaevskii方程暗孤子的定性性质，包括对称性、单调性、边界行为及非局部到局部收敛性
AI.motivation: 研究具有一般非局部相互作用的Gross-Pitaevskii方程暗孤子的定性性质，这些孤子对应亚音速行波，旨在理解非局部相互作用对暗孤子结构的影响
AI.techniques: 使用变分方法、对称性分析、单调性理论、非局部到局部收敛分析，以及暗孤子的定性分析技术
AI.main_theorems: 1) 提供暗孤子的均匀边界；2) 证明对称暗孤子的存在性；3) 识别单调性丧失的条件；4) 揭示黑孤子的新性质；5) 建立非局部模型孤子向局部Gross-Pitaevskii方程显式暗孤子的收敛性
AI.significance: 深化对非局部Gross-Pitaevskii方程暗孤子结构的理解，为玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚体中的暗孤子研究提供理论基础，建立非局部与局部模型间的桥梁

title: Homogenization of elasto-plastic evolutions driven by the flow of   dislocations
summary:
Starting from a prototypical model of elasto-plasticity in the small-strain
and quasi-static setting, where the evolution of the plastic distortion is
driven exclusively by the motion of discrete dislocations, this work performs a
rigorous homogenization procedure to a model involving continuously-distributed
dislocation fields. Our main result shows the existence of rate-independent
evolutions driven by the motion of dislocation fields, obtained as limits of
discrete dislocation evolutions. For all notions of solutions we employ the
recent concepts of space-time integral and normal currents, which is richer
than the classical approach using the Kr\"oner dislocation density tensor. The
key technical challenge is to find discrete dislocation evolutions
approximating a given dislocation field evolution, which requires a careful
recovery construction of space-time slip trajectories and associated
displacements. These methods enable one to transfer the properties, most
importantly the quasi-static stability, from the discrete to the field regime.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过严格的均匀化过程，将离散位错演化模型推广到连续分布位错场模型，建立了离散位错演化到连续位错场演化的极限存在性。
AI.motivation: 研究背景是小应变准静态条件下的弹塑性模型，其中塑性变形由离散位错运动驱动。核心问题是如何通过均匀化过程，从离散位错演化模型推导出连续分布位错场模型，建立离散与连续模型之间的数学联系。
AI.techniques: 主要采用时空积分和法向电流的现代概念（比传统的Kröner位错密度张量方法更丰富），通过恢复构造时空滑移轨迹和相关位移的精细技术，以及离散位错演化逼近给定位错场演化的方法。
AI.main_theorems: 主要结果证明了由位错场运动驱动的率无关演化的存在性，这些演化是离散位错演化的极限。建立了离散位错演化到连续位错场演化的极限过程，并保持了准静态稳定性等关键性质。
AI.significance: 该工作为位错理论提供了严格的数学基础，建立了离散与连续模型之间的桥梁，对理解塑性变形机制和材料科学中的位错动力学有重要理论意义，为后续研究提供了新的分析框架。

title: Stability analysis of hyperbolic-parabolic free boundary problems   modelling biofilms
comment:
We kindly request the withdrawal of our submission due to a
  misunderstanding among the co-authors regarding the decision to upload the
  work to arXiv. Not all authors had agreed to its public release, and the
  submission was made based on an internal miscommunication. We regret this
  oversight and appreciate your assistance in addressing this matter
summary:
We present the stability analysis of two free boundary problems arising in
biofilm modelling. The first, introduced in the 1980s by Wanner and Gujer, is
related to the competition between autotrophic and heterotrophic bacteria in a
biofilm bioreactor. It is a free boundary problem consisting of a system of
hyperbolic PDEs modelling biofilm growth and the competition between species, a
parabolic system accounting for substrate consumption, and an ODE for biofilm
thickness.
  The second, also based on the former, arises from the modelling of
trace-metal precipitation in biofilms, with a special focus on the role of
sulfate-reducing bacteria in the methane production process.
  The analysis is made into two steps, the first one being the existence and
uniqueness of the stationary solutions. The second one allows to show that the
calssical solutions converge to the stationary solutions by using a semigroup
approach and the energy method.
  We also extend the study to the precipitation model, in which the substrates
are modelled by a parabolic system with variable diffusion coefficients.

AI.tldr: 建立了生物膜模型中两个自由边界问题的稳定性分析框架，证明了稳态解的存在唯一性及经典解向稳态解的收敛性。
AI.motivation: 研究生物膜建模中的两个自由边界问题：第一个是Wanner和Gujer在1980年代提出的自养与异养细菌竞争模型；第二个是基于前者的痕量金属沉淀模型，特别关注硫酸盐还原菌在甲烷生产中的作用。
AI.techniques: 采用两步分析法：第一步证明稳态解的存在唯一性；第二步使用半群方法和能量方法证明经典解向稳态解的收敛性。对于沉淀模型，处理了变扩散系数的抛物系统。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 证明了两个生物膜自由边界问题稳态解的存在唯一性；2. 证明了经典解通过半群方法和能量方法收敛到稳态解；3. 将分析扩展到具有变扩散系数的沉淀模型。
AI.significance: 为生物膜动力学提供了严格的数学分析框架，建立了自由边界问题稳定性理论，对理解生物膜中物种竞争和金属沉淀过程有重要理论意义，为相关生物反应器优化提供数学基础。

title: Existence and uniqueness of solution to a hyperbolic-parabolic free   boundary problem for biofilm growth
comment:
We kindly request the withdrawal of our submission due to a
  misunderstanding among the co-authors regarding the decision to upload the
  work to arXiv. Not all authors had agreed to its public release, and the
  submission was made based on an internal miscommunication. We regret this
  oversight and appreciate your assistance in addressing this matter
summary:
This work presents the existence and uniqueness of solution to a free
boundary value problem related to biofilm growth. The problem consists of a
system of nonlinear hyperbolic partial differential equations governing the
microbial species growth, and a system of parabolic partial differential
equations describing the substrate dynamics. The free boundary evolution is
governed by an ordinary differential equation that accounts for the thickness
of the biofilm. We use the method of characteristics and fixed point strategies
to prove the existence and uniqueness theorem in small and all times. All the
equations are converted into integral equations, in particular this
transformation is made for the parabolic equations by using the Green's
functions. We consider Dirichlet-Neumann and Neumann-Robin boundary conditions
for the substrates equations and their extension to the case with variable

AI.tldr: 证明了生物膜生长自由边界值问题解的存在唯一性
AI.motivation: 研究生物膜生长过程的数学模型，该模型涉及微生物物种增长的非线性双曲偏微分方程系统和底物动力学的抛物偏微分方程系统，自由边界演化由描述生物膜厚度的常微分方程控制
AI.techniques: 使用特征线法和不动点策略，将所有方程转化为积分方程，特别是对抛物方程使用格林函数进行转换
AI.main_theorems: 证明了在短时间和所有时间下解的存在唯一性定理，考虑了底物方程的Dirichlet-Neumann和Neumann-Robin边界条件及其变系数情况的推广
AI.significance: 为生物膜生长的数学模型提供了严格的数学理论基础，对理解生物膜动力学和相关的应用问题具有重要意义

title: Stability Estimates in Kinetic Wasserstein Distances for the   Vlasov-Poisson System with Yudovich Density
summary:
We investigate the stability of solutions to the Vlasov-Poisson system using
the unifying framework of the kinetic Wasserstein distance, introduced by
Iacobelli in (Section 4 in Arch. Ration. Mech. Anal. 244 (2022), no. 1, 27-50).
This allows us to treat both macroscopic densities that lie in a Yudovich
space, as recently considered by Crippa et al. (Theorem 1.6 in Nonlinearity 37
(2024), no. 9, 095015) for the $1$-Wasserstein distance, and higher order
Wasserstein distances, for which only bounded macroscopic densities were
treated by Iacobelli and the first author (Theorem 1.11 in Bull. Lond. Math.
Soc. 56 (2024), 2250-2267). First, we establish an $L^p$-estimate on the
difference between two force fields in terms of a suitable nonlinear quantity
that controls the kinetic Wasserstein distance between their macroscopic
densities. Second, we use this estimate in order to derive a closable
Osgood-type inequality for the kinetic Wasserstein distance between two
solutions. This enables us to prove our main theorem; for $1 \le p < +\infty$
we show the $p$-Wasserstein stability of solutions to the Vlasov-Poisson system
with macroscopic densities belonging to a Yudovich space.

AI.tldr: 该论文利用动能Wasserstein距离框架，建立了Vlasov-Poisson系统在Yudovich空间中解的p-Wasserstein稳定性。
AI.motivation: 研究Vlasov-Poisson系统解的稳定性问题，统一处理Yudovich空间中的宏观密度和高阶Wasserstein距离，扩展了之前Crippa等人和Iacobelli等人的工作。
AI.techniques: 采用Iacobelli引入的动能Wasserstein距离统一框架，建立力场差异的L^p估计，推导闭的Osgood型不等式，控制两个解之间的动能Wasserstein距离。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了对于1≤p<∞，Vlasov-Poisson系统在Yudovich空间中宏观密度的p-Wasserstein稳定性。
AI.significance: 统一了之前分别处理Yudovich空间和Wasserstein距离的工作，为Vlasov-Poisson系统的稳定性分析提供了更一般的框架，对等离子体物理和天体物理中的动力学方程研究有重要意义。

title: Degenerate parabolic equations in divergence form: fundamental solution   and Gaussian bounds
comment:
26 pages. Comments are welcome. The content remains unchanged, with
  only a few typos corrected and minor revisions to the bibliography
summary:
In this paper, we consider second order degenerate parabolic equations with
complex, measurable, and time-dependent coefficients. The degenerate
ellipticity is dictated by a spatial $A_2$-weight. We prove that having a
generalized fundamental solution with upper Gaussian bounds is equivalent to
Moser's $L^2$-$L^\infty$ estimates for local weak solutions. In the special
case of real coefficients, Moser's $L^2$-$L^\infty$ estimates are known, which
provide an easier proof of Gaussian upper bounds, and a known Harnack
inequality is then used to derive Gaussian lower bounds.

AI.tldr: 证明了具有复系数、可测且依赖于时间的二阶退化抛物方程中，广义基本解的高斯上界与局部弱解的Moser型L²-L∞估计等价
AI.motivation: 研究具有复系数、可测且依赖于时间的二阶退化抛物方程，其退化椭圆性由空间A₂权控制，旨在建立基本解的高斯估计与弱解正则性之间的等价关系
AI.techniques: 使用A₂权理论、Moser迭代方法、退化抛物方程的正则性理论，以及实系数情形下的Harnack不等式
AI.main_theorems: 证明了广义基本解的高斯上界与局部弱解的Moser型L²-L∞估计等价；在实系数情形下，利用已知的Moser估计得到高斯上界，再通过Harnack不等式推导高斯下界
AI.significance: 建立了退化抛物方程基本解性质与弱解正则性之间的深刻联系，为复系数退化抛物方程理论提供了重要工具，扩展了经典抛物正则性理论到更一般的系数情形

title: On the magnetic Dirichlet to Neumann operator on the exterior of the   disk -- diamagnetism, weak-magnetic field limit and flux effects
summary:
In this paper, we analyze the magnetic Dirichlet-to-Neumann operator (D-to-N
map) $\check \Lambda(b,\nu)$ on the exterior of the disk with respect to a
magnetic potential $A_{b, \nu}=A^b + A_\nu$ where, for $b\in \mathbb R$ and
$\nu \in \mathbb R$, $A^b (x,y)= b\, (-y, x)$ and $A_\nu (x,y)$ is the
Aharonov-Bohm potential centered at the origin of flux $2\pi \nu$. First, we
show that the limit of $\check \Lambda(b,\nu)$ as $b\rightarrow 0$ is equal to
the D-to-N map $\widehat \Lambda (\nu)$ on the interior of the disk associated
with the potential $A_\nu (x,y)$. Secondly, we study the ground state energy of
the D-to-N map $\check \Lambda(b,\nu)$ and show that the strong diamagnetism
property holds. Finally we slightly extend to the exterior case the asymptotic
results obtained in the interior case for general domains.

AI.tldr: 该论文分析了圆盘外部磁Dirichlet-to-Neumann算子的极限行为、基态能量和渐近性质
AI.motivation: 研究圆盘外部磁Dirichlet-to-Neumann算子的性质，特别关注其与内部算子的关系、基态能量的强反磁性以及一般域渐近结果的推广
AI.techniques: 使用磁Dirichlet-to-Neumann算子理论、Aharonov-Bohm势分析、极限分析技术、基态能量估计和渐近展开方法
AI.main_theorems: 1. 当b→0时外部磁D-to-N算子收敛于内部D-to-N算子；2. 外部磁D-to-N算子的基态能量满足强反磁性性质；3. 将内部一般域的渐近结果推广到外部情形
AI.significance: 建立了内外磁D-to-N算子的联系，深化了对磁Dirichlet-to-Neumann算子性质的理解，为相关物理问题的数学分析提供了理论基础

title: An inverse Problem for the cubic $\alpha$-NLS in Sobolev spaces
summary:
In this work, we address an inverse problem for a defocusing cubic nonlinear
Schr\"{o}dinger (NLS) equation in dimensions $d\in\{1, 2,3\}$ in a range of
Sobolev spaces $H^s(\mathbb{R}^d)$ by employing the method of approximate
solutions. We recover a smooth, space-dependent and compactly supported
function $\alpha$ that controls the nonlinearity (and thus self-interaction
strength) in a multiplicative fashion. To the best of our knowledge, this is
the first work based on approximate solutions in Sobolev spaces that treats an
inverse problem for the NLS and provides explicit recovery of $\alpha$.

AI.tldr: 首次在Sobolev空间中基于近似解方法解决NLS方程逆问题，显式恢复控制非线性强度的空间依赖函数α
AI.motivation: 研究散焦立方非线性薛定谔方程在1-3维空间中的逆问题，旨在从观测数据中恢复控制非线性强度的空间依赖函数α，该函数以乘法方式影响非线性自相互作用强度
AI.techniques: 采用近似解方法，在Sobolev空间H^s(ℝ^d)框架下分析，处理空间依赖且紧支撑的平滑函数α的恢复问题
AI.main_theorems: 在Sobolev空间H^s(ℝ^d)中建立了散焦立方NLS方程逆问题的解，显式恢复了控制非线性强度的空间依赖函数α
AI.significance: 这是首次在Sobolev空间中基于近似解方法处理NLS方程逆问题并显式恢复非线性参数的工作，为非线性波方程的参数识别问题提供了新方法

title: The global existence and blowup of the classical solution to the   relativistic dust in a FLRW geometry
comment: This paper contains 29 pages, all comments are welcome
summary:
This paper is concerned with the global existence and blowup of the classical
solution to the Cauchy problem of the relativistic Euler equation
  with $ p=0 $ in a fixed Friedmann-Lema\^{\i}tre-Robertson-Walker (FLRW)
spacetime. The aim of this work is to study clearly the effect of the expansion
rate of the spacetime on the life span of the classical solution to the
pressureless fluid. Since the density and the velocity of the relativistic dust
admits the same principal part, we can obtain much more accurate results by the
characteristic method rather than energy estimates.

AI.tldr: 研究FLRW时空中相对论性无压流体（p=0）经典解的全局存在性和爆破问题，特别关注时空膨胀率对解寿命的影响
AI.motivation: 研究相对论欧拉方程在固定FLRW时空中的Cauchy问题，特别关注无压流体（p=0）的情况。主要动机是明确研究时空膨胀率对经典解寿命的影响，理解膨胀宇宙背景如何影响相对论性尘埃（无压流体）的演化行为。
AI.techniques: 采用特征线法而非能量估计，因为密度和速度具有相同的主部，特征线法能获得更精确的结果。该方法特别适合处理相对论性尘埃的特性。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了相对论欧拉方程在FLRW时空中经典解的全局存在性和爆破条件，给出了解寿命的精确估计，明确了时空膨胀率对解寿命的具体影响机制。
AI.significance: 为理解膨胀宇宙中相对论性尘埃的演化提供了精确的数学框架，揭示了时空几何（特别是膨胀率）对流体动力学行为的关键影响，对宇宙学和广义相对论中的流体动力学研究有重要理论意义。

title: Parabolic Extrapolation and Its Applications to Characterizing Parabolic   BMO Spaces via Parabolic Fractional Commutators
summary:
In this article, we establish the parabolic version of the celebrated Rubio
de Francia extrapolation theorem. As applications, we obtain new
characterizations of parabolic BMO-type spaces in terms of various commutators
of parabolic fractional operators with time lag. The key tools to achieve these
include to establish the appropriate form in the parabolic setting of the
parabolic Rubio de Francia iteration algorithm, the Cauchy integral trick, and
a modified Fourier series expansion argument adapted to the parabolic geometry.
The novelty of these results lies in the fact that, for the first time, we not
only introduce a new class of commutators associated with parabolic fractional
integral operators with time lag, but also utilize them to provide a
characterization of the parabolic BMO-type space in the high-dimensional case.

AI.tldr: 建立了抛物型Rubio de Francia外推定理，并利用带时滞的抛物型分数算子交换子刻画了抛物型BMO空间。
AI.motivation: 经典Rubio de Francia外推定理在调和分析中非常重要，但抛物型版本尚未建立。抛物型方程在数学物理中广泛应用，需要发展相应的调和分析工具来研究抛物型BMO空间等函数空间。
AI.techniques: 抛物型Rubio de Francia迭代算法、Cauchy积分技巧、适应抛物几何的修正傅里叶级数展开、带时滞的抛物型分数算子交换子分析。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 抛物型Rubio de Francia外推定理；2. 利用带时滞的抛物型分数算子交换子刻画高维抛物型BMO空间的新特征。
AI.significance: 首次建立了抛物型外推定理，为抛物型调和分析提供了新工具；引入带时滞的抛物型分数算子交换子新类，并用于刻画抛物型BMO空间，对抛物型偏微分方程理论有重要意义。

title: Well-Posedness of the Free Boundary Incompressible Porous Media Equation
summary:
We consider the free boundary incompressible porous media equation which
describes the dynamics of a density transported by a Darcy flow in the field of
gravity, with a free boundary between the fluid region and the dry region above
it. For any stratified density state, we identify a stability condition for the
initial free boundary. Under this condition, we prove that small localized
perturbations of the stratified density lead to unique local-in-time solutions
in Sobolev spaces.
  Our proof involves analytic ingredients that are of independent interest,
including tame fractional Sobolev estimates for operators that map the
Dirichlet boundary function and the forcing function of Poisson's equation to
its solution in domains of Sobolev regularity.

AI.tldr: 证明了自由边界不可压缩多孔介质方程中分层密度状态在小局部扰动下的局部适定性，并建立了稳定性条件。
AI.motivation: 研究自由边界不可压缩多孔介质方程，该方程描述了在重力场中由达西流输运的密度动力学，具有流体区域与上方干燥区域之间的自由边界。关注分层密度状态的稳定性问题。
AI.techniques: 使用Sobolev空间理论，发展了独立意义的解析工具，包括将Dirichlet边界函数和泊松方程强迫函数映射到其解的有理分数Sobolev估计。
AI.main_theorems: 对于任何分层密度状态，识别了初始自由边界的稳定性条件；在该条件下，证明了分层密度的小局部扰动在Sobolev空间中存在唯一的局部时间解。
AI.significance: 为自由边界多孔介质流动问题提供了严格的数学分析框架，发展了处理此类自由边界问题的解析工具，对流体力学和偏微分方程理论有重要贡献。

title: An inverse Signorini obstacle problem
summary:
We study the inverse problem of determining a Signorini obstacle from
boundary measurements for the isotropic elasticity system. We prove that the
obstacle can be uniquely determined by a single measurement of displacement and
normal stress for the Signorini problem on an open subset of the boundary up to
a natural obstruction. In addition to considering the Signorini problem, we
develop techniques that can be used to study inverse problems for general
differential inequalities.

AI.tldr: 证明了通过单次边界测量可以唯一确定弹性系统Signorini问题中的障碍物（除自然障碍外）
AI.motivation: 研究各向同性弹性系统中Signorini障碍物的反问题，即通过边界测量确定障碍物的形状和位置，这是弹性力学反问题的重要课题
AI.techniques: 发展了研究微分不等式反问题的一般技术，包括边界测量分析、唯一性证明方法，以及处理Signorini边界条件的专门工具
AI.main_theorems: 证明了障碍物可由边界位移和法向应力的单次测量唯一确定（除自然障碍外），建立了Signorini问题反问题的唯一性结果
AI.significance: 为弹性力学反问题提供了新的理论框架，发展了处理微分不等式反问题的通用技术，在无损检测、地质勘探等领域有潜在应用

title: Breakdown of smooth solutions to the subcritical EPDiff equation
summary:
We consider the EPDiff equation on $\mathbb{R}^n$ with the integer-order
homogeneous Sobolev inertia operator $A=(-\Delta)^k$. We prove that for
arbitrary radial initial data and a sign condition on the initial momentum, the
corresponding radial velocity solution has $C^1$ norm that blows up in finite
time whenever $0\le k<n/2+1.$ Our approach is to use Lagrangian coordinates to
formulate EPDiff as an ODE on a Banach space, enabling us to use a comparison
estimate with the Liouville equation. Along the way we derive the Green
function in terms of hypergeometric functions and discuss their properties.
This is a step toward proving the general conjecture that the EPDiff equation
is globally well-posed for any Sobolev inertia operator of any real order $k$
if and only if $k\ge n/2+1$.

AI.tldr: 证明了EPDiff方程在整数阶齐次Sobolev惯性算子下，当$0\le k<n/2+1$时，径向速度解的$C^1$范数会在有限时间内爆破。
AI.motivation: 研究EPDiff方程（Euler-Poincaré微分方程）在$\mathbb{R}^n$上的爆破行为，该方程是流体力学中的重要模型，特别是与Camassa-Holm方程和Euler方程相关。核心问题是确定惯性算子阶数$k$与解全局存在性之间的关系。
AI.techniques: 使用拉格朗日坐标将EPDiff方程转化为Banach空间上的ODE；利用Liouville方程的比较估计；推导超几何函数形式的格林函数并分析其性质。
AI.main_theorems: 对于任意径向初始数据和初始动量满足符号条件的情况，当$0\le k<n/2+1$时，对应的径向速度解的$C^1$范数在有限时间内爆破。
AI.significance: 这是证明一般猜想的重要一步：EPDiff方程对于任意实数阶$k$的Sobolev惯性算子全局适定当且仅当$k\ge n/2+1$。该结果深化了对EPDiff方程爆破机制的理解，并为相关流体力学模型的适定性理论提供了新见解。

title: Computationally Efficient Analysis of Energy Distribution Networks using   Finite Volume Method and Interpolatory Model Order Reduction
summary:
Energy distribution networks are crucial for human societies and since they
often cover large geographical areas, their physical analysis is challenging.
Modeling and simulation can be used to analyze such complex energy networks. In
this paper, we performed discretization on the underlying partial differential
equations of a pipeline and identified the complete network model for the gas,
water and power distribution network. The discretized network model can be
represented in a unified state-space form, that is, a specific matrix vector
form for a set of differential-algebraic equations (DAEs). Due to the size and
complexity of these models, their simulation can be computationally expensive.
To address this issue, we applied model order reduction to the original unified
mathematical model, constructing a reduced-order model that approximates the
behavior of the original model with minimal computational cost. Specifically,
we utilize the tangential iterative rational Krylov algorithm (tIRKA) which
ensure that the interpolation condition of the linear part of the original and
the reduced nonlinear unified models are interpolating along the predefined
tangent directions. A specific scenario of the energy network is simulated with
and without model order reduction and the behaviour is observed in terms of its
performance.

AI.tldr: 提出基于tIRKA算法的模型降阶方法，用于统一状态空间形式的能源网络DAE模型降维，降低计算成本
AI.motivation: 能源分布网络覆盖广阔地理区域，物理分析困难，传统建模与仿真计算成本高昂，需要高效降阶方法
AI.techniques: 偏微分方程离散化、统一状态空间表示、微分代数方程(DAE)建模、切向迭代有理Krylov算法(tIRKA)、模型降阶技术
AI.main_theorems: 建立了能源网络的统一状态空间模型，应用tIRKA算法确保原始非线性模型与降阶模型在预定切向方向上的插值条件
AI.significance: 为大规模复杂能源网络提供高效仿真框架，降低计算成本，促进智能电网和综合能源系统分析

title: Principal spectral rigidity implies subprincipal spectral rigidity
summary:
We study the inverse spectral problem of jointly recovering a radially
symmetric Riemannian metric and an additional coefficient from the Dirichlet
spectrum of a perturbed Laplace-Beltrami operator on a bounded domain.
Specifically, we consider the elliptic operator \[ L_{a,b} := e^{a-b} \nabla
\cdot e^b \nabla \] on the unit ball $ B \subset \mathbb{R}^3 $, where the
scalar functions $ a = a(|x|) $ and $ b = b(|x|) $ are spherically symmetric
and satisfy certain geometric conditions. While the function $ a $ influences
the principal symbol of $ L $, the function $ b $ appears in its first-order
terms. We investigate the extent to which the Dirichlet eigenvalues of $
L_{a,b} $ uniquely determine the pair $ (a, b) $ and establish spectral
rigidity results under suitable assumptions.

AI.tldr: 证明了在单位球上，从扰动Laplace-Beltrami算子的Dirichlet谱可以联合恢复径向对称黎曼度量和附加系数
AI.motivation: 研究逆谱问题：从Dirichlet谱中联合恢复径向对称黎曼度量和附加系数，探索谱数据对几何结构的确定程度
AI.techniques: 使用径向对称性简化问题，分析扰动Laplace-Beltrami算子的谱特性，建立谱刚性结果
AI.main_theorems: 在适当假设下，Dirichlet谱唯一确定函数对(a,b)，建立了谱刚性定理
AI.significance: 扩展了逆谱问题理论，为从谱数据恢复几何结构提供了新结果，在几何分析和偏微分方程理论中有重要意义
